pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce the new baseline.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler plugin to process Lombok annotations.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this configuration, Lombok annotations will not be processed during compilation, leading to missing getter/setter/constructor errors.
